cv_data.summary: AI/ML developer specializing in implementing Gen-AI in real world projects, multimodal AI, RAG-based LLM systems, andhealthcare AI applications. Experienced in building production-ready AI products with modern React frontends and scalabledeployments. Strong foundation in Problem Solving - DSA(C++), Machine Learning, Deep Learning.
